description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:focal Docker image and defines an apt-cache cache keyed by apt-cache storing the apt-cache/ directory. Include a global before_script that runs: export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; export APT_CACHE_DIR=`pwd`/apt-cache && mkdir -pv $APT_CACHE_DIR; set PACKAGES="build-essential pkg-config doxygen git" and append "qt5-qmake qtbase5-dev qtdeclarative5-dev qtchooser" "libqt5quicktest5 qml-module-qtquick2 qml-module-qttest" "lcov gcovr"; then apt-get update -yq && apt-get -o dir::cache::archives="$APT_CACHE_DIR" install -yq $PACKAGES; git submodule init; git submodule update. Define three stages: build, test, deploy. In the build stage add a build_amd64 job that runs the script commands: export QT_SELECT=qt5; mkdir build; cd build; qmake CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=coverage CONFIG+=nomake_examples ..; make -j 4; and publishes the build/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test_amd64 job that depends on build_amd64, runs: find build | xargs touch; cd build; export QT_QPA_PLATFORM="minimal"; make coverage-html; captures all files as artifacts and extracts line coverage using the regex /^ *lines\.*:\s+(\d+.\d+\%)/. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, depends on test_amd64, runs: mkdir public; cp -a build/coverage-html public/coverage; and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
